explorer.subtitle: Safeguarding India's Wisdom with Digital Sovereignty

explorer.noBioAssets: No approved biological assets yet. Submit assets through the community dashboard.
explorer.introHeading: Preserving and Licensing Indigenous Knowledge through Structured Governance

marketplace.title: Cultural Asset Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Structured licensing for verified indigenous knowledge and media. Only community-approved assets are listed here.
marketplace.noApproved: No approved assets in the marketplace yet. Assets appear here after community review approval.
marketplace.noMatch: No assets match the current filters.
marketplace.restrictionText: ⚠️ This cultural archive is protected under indigenous heritage law. You may not commercially use, reproduce, or publish this material under your name. Please review licensing details for authorised usage.
marketplace.licenseRequired: License Required for: Commercial / Research / Media Use
marketplace.frameworkSubtitle: Browse the license types available on this platform before assets are approved.

upload.selectStructure: Select the structure of the cultural knowledge you wish to preserve.
upload.bioDesc: Biological knowledge, medicinal practices, agricultural techniques, and ecological wisdom.
upload.sonicDesc: Musical archives, ritual chants, oral histories, and performance media.
upload.successMsg: Your archival record has been timestamped and encrypted. It is now pending institutional review.
upload.micError: Could not access camera/microphone. Please check permissions.
upload.submissionFailed: Submission failed. Please check your connection and try again.
